config.neo4j.topic.cypher.graph.mutation-reques: WITH event.value.payload AS p FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'upsert_document' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (n:Document {stable_id: p.stable_id}) SET n += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'upsert_article' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (n:Article {stable_id: p.stable_id}) SET n += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'upsert_source' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (n:Source {stable_id: p.stable_id}) SET n += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'upsert_evidence' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (n:Evidence {stable_id: p.stable_id}) SET n += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'upsert_claim' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (n:Claim {stable_id: p.stable_id}) SET n += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'upsert_entity' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (n:Entity {stable_id: p.stable_id}) SET n += p.properties FOREACH (__ IN CASE WHEN p.entity_type = 'Company' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | SET n:Company) FOREACH (__ IN CASE WHEN p.entity_type = 'Organization' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | SET n:Organization) FOREACH (__ IN CASE WHEN p.entity_type = 'GovernmentAgency' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | SET n:GovernmentAgency) FOREACH (__ IN CASE WHEN p.entity_type = 'Person' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | SET n:Person) FOREACH (__ IN CASE WHEN p.entity_type = 'Location' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | SET n:Location)) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'link_published' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (a {stable_id: p.from_id}) MERGE (b {stable_id: p.to_id}) MERGE (a)-[r:PUBLISHED {stable_id: p.stable_id}]->(b) SET r += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'link_article_document' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (a {stable_id: p.from_id}) MERGE (b {stable_id: p.to_id}) MERGE (a)-[r:DERIVED_FROM {stable_id: p.stable_id}]->(b) SET r += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'link_mentions' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (a {stable_id: p.from_id}) MERGE (b {stable_id: p.to_id}) MERGE (a)-[r:MENTIONS {stable_id: p.stable_id}]->(b) SET r += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'link_evidence_entity' OR p.mutation_type = 'link_evidence_claim' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (a {stable_id: p.from_id}) MERGE (b {stable_id: p.to_id}) MERGE (a)-[r:EVIDENCE_FOR {stable_id: p.stable_id}]->(b) SET r += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'link_article_claim' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (a {stable_id: p.from_id}) MERGE (b {stable_id: p.to_id}) MERGE (a)-[r:MAKES_CLAIM {stable_id: p.stable_id}]->(b) SET r += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'link_partnered_with' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (a {stable_id: p.from_id}) MERGE (b {stable_id: p.to_id}) MERGE (a)-[r:PARTNERED_WITH {stable_id: p.stable_id}]->(b) SET r += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'link_acquired' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (a {stable_id: p.from_id}) MERGE (b {stable_id: p.to_id}) MERGE (a)-[r:ACQUIRED {stable_id: p.stable_id}]->(b) SET r += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'link_invested_in' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (a {stable_id: p.from_id}) MERGE (b {stable_id: p.to_id}) MERGE (a)-[r:INVESTED_IN {stable_id: p.stable_id}]->(b) SET r += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'link_competes_with' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (a {stable_id: p.from_id}) MERGE (b {stable_id: p.to_id}) MERGE (a)-[r:COMPETES_WITH {stable_id: p.stable_id}]->(b) SET r += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'link_regulates' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (a {stable_id: p.from_id}) MERGE (b {stable_id: p.to_id}) MERGE (a)-[r:REGULATES {stable_id: p.stable_id}]->(b) SET r += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'link_affects' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (a {stable_id: p.from_id}) MERGE (b {stable_id: p.to_id}) MERGE (a)-[r:AFFECTS {stable_id: p.stable_id}]->(b) SET r += p.properties) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN p.mutation_type = 'link_related_to' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (a {stable_id: p.from_id}) MERGE (b {stable_id: p.to_id}) MERGE (a)-[r:RELATED_TO {stable_id: p.stable_id}]->(b) SET r += p.properties) RETURN p.stable_id AS stable_id
config.errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: graph.mutation-requested.v1.dlq
